headline: UPS Inks Deal to Cap Driver Buyouts: Will the Cost Burden Ease?
summary: UPS struck a Teamsters deal capping driver severance buyouts at 7,500 and $150K each as it cuts jobs and reshapes the network through 2026.

raw.headline: UPS Inks Deal to Cap Driver Buyouts: Will the Cost Burden Ease?
raw.summary: UPS struck a Teamsters deal capping driver severance buyouts at 7,500 and $150K each as it cuts jobs and reshapes the network through 2026.

headline: FedEx Stock Rises 16.2% in 3 Months: Buy the Rally or Wait?
summary: FedEx's shares are up 16.2% in three months, powered by cost cuts and upbeat FY26 guidance --- but fuel spikes and trade-policy shifts cloud the near term.

raw.headline: FedEx Stock Rises 16.2% in 3 Months: Buy the Rally or Wait?
raw.summary: FedEx's shares are up 16.2% in three months, powered by cost cuts and upbeat FY26 guidance --- but fuel spikes and trade-policy shifts cloud the near term.

headline: Mailing your tax return near the deadline comes with a risk that 'matters more now than ever'
summary: While the IRS considers your return being filed on time as long as it's postmarked by the deadline, not all mail gets a postmark the day it's sent.

raw.headline: Mailing your tax return near the deadline comes with a risk that 'matters more now than ever'
raw.summary: While the IRS considers your return being filed on time as long as it's postmarked by the deadline, not all mail gets a postmark the day it's sent.

headline: CNBC Daily Open: Trump says Iran can 'be taken out in one night'
summary: Sharpening rhetoric erodes confidence of a breakthrough between Iran and the White House ahead of an 8 p.m. ET deadline.
